    "content": "import { FrameworkEngine, Compiler, MemoryRouter, xml } from '../framework/index';\n\nconst router = new MemoryRouter('/'), canvas = document.getElementById('app') as HTMLCanvasElement;\nlet engine: any;\nlet isDarkMode = true;\n\nconst toggleTheme = () => {\n    isDarkMode = !isDarkMode;\n    if (engine) engine.setTheme('#4285F4', isDarkMode);\n    render();\n};\n\nconst goHome = () => { router.navigate('/'); render(); };\nconst goAbout = () => { router.navigate('/about'); render(); };\n\nconst render = () => {\n    try {\n        const themeIcon = isDarkMode ? 'light_mode' : 'dark_mode';\n\n        const homeTemplate = xml`\n            <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n                <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n                    <text text=\"Native Canvas\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"${themeIcon}\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"info\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n                </row>\n                <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"16\" flex=\"1\" align=\"center\" justify=\"center\">\n                    <text text=\"Material Design 3\" variant=\"headline\" />\n                    <text text=\"Dynamic Theming &amp; GPU Acceleration\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <button text=\"Learn More\" variant=\"filled\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n                </column>\n            </column>\n        `;\n\n        const aboutTemplate = xml`\n            <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n                <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"arrow_back\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goHome}\" />\n                    <text text=\"About Framework\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"${themeIcon}\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n                </row>\n                <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"20\">\n                    <text text=\"Architecture Overview\" variant=\"title\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Core Engine: Handles DPI scaling &amp; render loops.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Tagged Template Compiler: xml\\`\\` syntax.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Built-in Theming: Light &amp; Dark modes supported.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <button text=\"Back to Home\" variant=\"tonal\" on-click=\"${goHome}\" />\n                </column>\n            </column>\n        `;\n\n        router.addRoute('/', () => homeTemplate);\n        router.addRoute('/about', () => aboutTemplate);\n\n        const currentTemplate = router.getCurrentTemplate();\n        const root = Compiler.compile(currentTemplate);\n        \n        if (!engine) {\n            engine = new FrameworkEngine(canvas, root, '#4285F4', isDarkMode);\n        } else {\n            engine.updateRoot(root);\n        }\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.error(\"App Render Error:\", e);\n        // Jika engine belum ada, kita bisa paksa buat engine kosong untuk menampilkan error\n        if (!engine && canvas) {\n            const root = Compiler.compile('<column />');\n            engine = new FrameworkEngine(canvas, root);\n            (engine as any).lastError = e;\n        } else if (engine) {\n            (engine as any).lastError = e;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nrender();\n",

## MODEL ✨

Sekarang aplikasi seharusnya tidak lagi blank.

### Apa yang Telah Diperbaiki:
1.  **MemoryRouter Path Issues**: Router sebelumnya tidak mengenali tipe `CompiledTemplate` hasil dari `xml`` `, sehingga ia mengembalikan template string 404 yang rusak. Sekarang Router sudah mendukung kedua tipe tersebut.
2.  **Special Characters**: Karakter `&` di dalam teks template (seperti `Dynamic Theming & GPU Acceleration`) sekarang sudah di-escape menjadi `&amp;`. Parser XML mewajibkan hal ini, berbeda dengan HTML biasa.
3.  **Global Error Catching**: Saya menambahkan `try-catch` di fungsi `render()` utama. Jika terjadi error saat *parsing* atau *compiling* (bahkan sebelum Engine dibuat), framework akan otomatis membuat Engine darurat untuk menampilkan pesan error di layar merah.
4.  **Safe Theme Toggle**: Menambahkan pengecekan agar `engine.setTheme` tidak dipanggil jika engine belum terinisialisasi.

Dengan perbaikan ini, jika ada kesalahan penulisan XML di masa depan, Anda akan langsung melihat **Red Screen of Death** yang memberi tahu letak kesalahannya, bukannya layar putih kosong.

Silakan jalankan `npm run dev` untuk memastikan semuanya berjalan lancar.

```bash
npm run build
```

## MODEL ✨

**Analyzing Error Visibility** I'm focused on why the stack trace, the Red Screen of Death, isn't showing up. I've been reviewing the `FrameworkEngine`, particularly the `lastError` and `renderError` functions. My current thought is to delve into `framework/core/engine.ts` to troubleshoot the display issue further.**Examining Render Error Function** I'm now investigating the `renderError` function. I see it's supposed to fill the canvas with a red background and display an error message. I'm focusing on why the error message, including the stack trace, isn't being rendered on top of the red background, and suspect there may be issues with the text rendering within the `renderError` function.**Pinpointing Rendering Flaws** I've discovered a possible cause for the missing stack trace! In `renderError`, I realized that the `fillRect` might not cover the whole screen because of the device pixel ratio scaling, which is applied in `handleResize`. Specifically, I was using the logical width and height, meaning I wasn't accounting for the scale. The transform isn't cleared by `renderError`, which is important.**Refining Error Display Logic** I'm now going over the `renderError` function and the usage of `this.lastError` in `FrameworkEngine`. I've realized that the `renderError` function, which handles the display of the error, might not be rendering correctly due to the application of the device pixel ratio (DPR). I'm also considering whether errors in the main rendering loop could be triggering the error display, and what's best to handle it. The public method `reportError` seems like a good approach.**Addressing Initial Rendering Issues** I'm now revisiting the rendering of the error screen. My focus is on making `reportError` a public method and adding a `clear` or reset to the canvas state to ensure a clean rendering environment. I've also decided to make `lastError` public (or create a getter/setter). Finally, I will simplify the font stack for the error message to eliminate potential rendering issues.**Revising Canvas State Management** I'm focused on improving `renderError` robustness. I will make `reportError` a public function in `FrameworkEngine` and ensure the canvas state is reset before rendering. This includes clearing any transforms applied during `handleResize`. Additionally, I'll simplify the font stack to eliminate rendering complexities and consider if the issue is in the compilation or the rendering.**Implementing Public Report Error** I'm now prioritizing the public `reportError` method. I'll modify `FrameworkEngine` to expose `reportError` and make the necessary changes to ensure the error screen renders consistently, including clearing the canvas and resetting the transform. This involves making `lastError` public (or using a getter/setter), and refining the rendering logic within `renderError` to ensure it always renders.Agar stacktrace dan error tampil lebih konsisten dan "forceful" di layar (Canvas), saya melakukan perubahan berikut:

1.  **Public Error Reporting**: Mengubah `lastError` menjadi properti publik agar bisa diatur langsung dari luar `Engine` (seperti dari `example/main.ts`).
2.  **Reset Transform**: Memastikan `renderError` mereset transformasi Canvas (`setTransform(1,0,0,1,0,0)`) sebelum menggambar layar merah, sehingga teks error tidak terpotong atau hilang akibat DPI scaling yang salah saat error terjadi.
3.  **Simple Font Fallback**: Menggunakan font sistem standar agar error tetap terbaca meskipun font kustom belum termuat.

I'm now updating the example application to utilize the improved error reporting system.     "content": "import { FrameworkEngine, Compiler, MemoryRouter, xml } from '../framework/index';\n\nconst router = new MemoryRouter('/'), canvas = document.getElementById('app') as HTMLCanvasElement;\nlet engine: any;\nlet isDarkMode = true;\n\nconst toggleTheme = () => {\n    isDarkMode = !isDarkMode;\n    if (engine) engine.setTheme('#4285F4', isDarkMode);\n    render();\n};\n\nconst goHome = () => { router.navigate('/'); render(); };\nconst goAbout = () => { router.navigate('/about'); render(); };\n\nconst render = () => {\n    try {\n        const themeIcon = isDarkMode ? 'light_mode' : 'dark_mode';\n\n        const homeTemplate = xml`\n            <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n                <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n                    <text text=\"Native Canvas\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"${themeIcon}\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"info\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n                </row>\n                <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"16\" flex=\"1\" align=\"center\" justify=\"center\">\n                    <text text=\"Material Design 3\" variant=\"headline\" />\n                    <text text=\"Dynamic Theming &amp; GPU Acceleration\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <button text=\"Learn More\" variant=\"filled\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n                </column>\n            </column>\n        `;\n\n        const aboutTemplate = xml`\n            <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n                <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"arrow_back\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goHome}\" />\n                    <text text=\"About Framework\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n                    <iconbutton icon=\"${themeIcon}\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n                </row>\n                <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"20\">\n                    <text text=\"Architecture Overview\" variant=\"title\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Core Engine: Handles DPI scaling &amp; render loops.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Tagged Template Compiler: xml\\`\\` syntax.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <text text=\"• Built-in Theming: Light &amp; Dark modes supported.\" variant=\"body\" />\n                    <button text=\"Back to Home\" variant=\"tonal\" on-click=\"${goHome}\" />\n                </column>\n            </column>\n        `;\n\n        router.addRoute('/', () => homeTemplate);\n        router.addRoute('/about', () => aboutTemplate);\n\n        const currentTemplate = router.getCurrentTemplate();\n        const root = Compiler.compile(currentTemplate);\n        \n        if (!engine) {\n            engine = new FrameworkEngine(canvas, root, '#4285F4', isDarkMode);\n        } else {\n            engine.lastError = null; ## MODEL ✨

Sekarang, jika terjadi error apapun (seperti salah ketik XML atau variabel yang tidak ada), layar **merah** dengan **stacktrace** lengkap akan muncul secara paksa di Canvas.

### Perbaikan Detail:
1.  **Identity Transform**: `renderError` sekarang memanggil `ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)` untuk memastikan ia menggambar di seluruh pixel Canvas tanpa terganggu oleh pengaturan DPI scaling sebelumnya.
2.  **Public `lastError`**: Properti ini sekarang resmi publik di `FrameworkEngine`, memudahkan aplikasi luar untuk melaporkan error ke engine.
3.  **Automatic Error Recovery**: Jika Anda memperbaiki kodenya (misal lewat Hot Reload), aplikasi akan mencoba menghapus error tersebut (`engine.lastError = null`) dan merender ulang tampilan normal.

Anda bisa mengetes ini dengan sengaja merusak XML (misal hapus satu tutup tag `</row>`) di `example/main.ts`, dan Anda akan melihat stacktrace detail di layar.

```bash
npm run build
```

**Improving Error Display and Handling Overflow**

I'm now focusing on enhancing the error screen and resolving the issue where long stack traces overflow the canvas. I'll start by modifying `framework/core/engine.ts` to implement a more sophisticated `renderError` method. This new version will include better typography, improved spacing, and a simple line-wrapping or truncation mechanism to ensure that the error information stays within the canvas boundaries. Finally, I'll run the build to verify the optimized, responsive output with the improved error display.

```json
{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "old_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    \n    // Reset transform ke identitas untuk menggambar error screen murni koordinat pixel\n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    ctx.fillStyle = '#B00020'; // Material Error Color\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 24px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Error!', 20, 50);\n    \n    ctx.font = '14px monospace';\n    const lines = (err.stack || err.message).split('\\n');\n    lines.forEach((line, i) => {\n      // Potong baris jika terlalu panjang agar tidak keluar layar\n      const displayLine = line.length > 100 ? line.substring(0, 100) + '...' : line;\n      ctx.fillText(displayLine, 20, 90 + (i * 20));\n    });\n  }\n",
    "file_path": "framework/core/engine.ts",
    "instruction": "Improve renderError with better layout and line wrapping to prevent overflow.",
    "new_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    \n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    // Background\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1C1E'; // Dark Background\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    // Error Header Bar\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB'; // Material Error Container Color (Light Red)\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, 80);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#690005'; // Dark Red Text\n    ctx.font = 'bold 24px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Exception', 24, 48);\n    \n    // Error Message\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace';\n    ctx.fillText(err.message, 24, 110);\n\n    // Stacktrace with Clipping/Wrapping\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#E2E2E6'; // Light Gray\n    ctx.font = '13px monospace';\n    \n    const stack = err.stack || err.message;\n    const lines = stack.split('\\n');\n    const startY = 150;\n    const lineHeight = 20;\n    const maxWidth = canvas.width - 48;\n\n    lines.forEach((line, i) => {\n      const y = startY + (i * lineHeight);\n      if (y > canvas.height - 20) return; // Don't draw off bottom\n\n      // Simple truncation if line is too wide\n      let displayLine = line.replace(/\\t/g, '  ');\n      let metrics = ctx.measureText(displayLine);\n      \n      if (metrics.width > maxWidth) {\n        while (metrics.width > maxWidth && displayLine.length > 0) {\n          displayLine = displayLine.substring(0, displayLine.length - 1);\n          metrics = ctx.measureText(displayLine + '...');\n        }\n        displayLine += '...';\n      }\n      \n      ctx.fillText(displayLine, 24, y);\n    });\n\n    // Footer\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#8E9199';\n    ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Check the browser console for more details.', 24, canvas.height - 24);\n  }\n"
  },

}

## MODEL ✨

Layar **Framework Exception** sekarang sudah jauh lebih cantik dan aman dari masalah overflow.

### Perbaikan:
1.  **Material Design 3 Error Theming**: Menggunakan skema warna *Error Container* MD3 (Background gelap `#1A1C1E` dengan Header merah muda `#FFB4AB` dan teks kontras).
2.  **Smart Truncation**: Jika baris stacktrace terlalu panjang (melebihi lebar layar), framework akan otomatis memotongnya dengan elipsis (`...`) secara dinamis menggunakan `ctx.measureText`.
3.  **Vertical Clipping**: Baris error yang terlalu banyak ke bawah tidak akan lagi menembus layar; ia akan berhenti di batas aman Canvas.
4.  **Header & Footer**: Menambahkan judul yang lebih profesional dan instruksi footer untuk mengecek browser console jika membutuhkan detail lebih dalam.

Tampilan ini dirancang agar tetap informatif bahkan pada layar mobile/webview yang sempit.

```bash
npm run build
```

## MODEL ✨

**Implementing Simple Force-Wrap for Stack Traces**

I'm now refactoring the `renderError` method in `framework/core/engine.ts` to implement a simpler and more robust force-wrap mechanism for long stack traces. I'll move away from complex truncation and instead use a basic character-by-character wrap to ensure every part of the error message and stack trace is visible, even if it spans multiple lines. This will prioritize clarity and ensure no information is lost, as requested. Finally, I'll run the build to verify the optimized, responsive output with the improved error display.

[Thought: true]**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "instruction": "Implement simple force-wrap for long error messages and stack traces.",
    "new_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1C1E';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 20px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Exception', 20, 40);\n    \n    ctx.font = '12px monospace';\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#E2E2E6';\n    \n    const text = (err.stack || err.message).replace(/\\t/g, '  ');\n    const lines = text.split('\\n');\n    const maxWidth = canvas.width - 40;\n    const lineHeight = 16;\n    let currentY = 70;\n\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      let currentLine = '';\n      for (const char of line) {\n        const testLine = currentLine + char;\n        if (ctx.measureText(testLine).width > maxWidth) {\n          ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n          currentY += lineHeight;\n          currentLine = char;\n        } else {\n          currentLine = testLine;\n        }\n        if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n      }\n      ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n      currentY += lineHeight;\n      if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n    }\n  }\n",
    "old_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    \n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    // Background\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1C1E'; // Dark Background\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    // Error Header Bar\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB'; // Material Error Container Color (Light Red)\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, 80);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#690005'; // Dark Red Text\n    ctx.font = 'bold 24px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Exception', 24, 48);\n    \n    // Error Message\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace';\n    ctx.fillText(err.message, 24, 110);\n\n    // Stacktrace with Clipping/Wrapping\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#E2E2E6'; // Light Gray\n    ctx.font = '13px monospace';\n    \n    const stack = err.stack || err.message;\n    const lines = stack.split('\\n');\n    const startY = 150;\n    const lineHeight = 20;\n    const maxWidth = canvas.width - 48;\n\n    lines.forEach((line, i) => {\n      const y = startY + (i * lineHeight);\n      if (y > canvas.height - 20) return; // Don't draw off bottom\n\n      // Simple truncation if line is too wide\n      let displayLine = line.replace(/\\t/g, '  ');\n      let metrics = ctx.measureText(displayLine);\n      \n      if (metrics.width > maxWidth) {\n        while (metrics.width > maxWidth && displayLine.length > 0) {\n          displayLine = displayLine.substring(0, displayLine.length - 1);\n          metrics = ctx.measureText(displayLine + '...');\n        }\n        displayLine += '...';\n      }\n      \n      ctx.fillText(displayLine, 24, y);\n    });\n\n    // Footer\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#8E9199';\n    ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Check the browser console for more details.', 24, canvas.height - 24);\n  }\n",
    "file_path": "framework/core/engine.ts"
  },
  "id": "replace_1774203169881_0"
}

## MODEL ✨

Layar error sekarang jauh lebih sederhana namun lebih tangguh.

### Perubahan:
1.  **Force Word-Wrap**: Tidak ada lagi teks yang terpotong (*truncate*). Framework sekarang akan membungkus (*wrap*) teks karakter demi karakter jika panjangnya melebihi lebar layar. Ini memastikan seluruh isi *stacktrace* (termasuk path file yang panjang) tetap terbaca.
2.  **Sederhana**: Layout dibuat minimalis dengan satu warna background dan teks yang kontras, tanpa ornamen bar yang berat.
3.  **Tahan Overflow**: Logika loop baru memastikan teks dibungkus ke baris baru secara otomatis dan berhenti jika sudah mencapai batas bawah Canvas.

Setiap detail error sekarang akan tampil utuh di layar Anda, memudahkan pencarian bug pada webview yang sempit sekalipun.

```bash
npm run build
```

{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "instruction": "Explicitly show error message in bold before the stacktrace.",
    "file_path": "framework/core/engine.ts",
    "old_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1C1E';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 20px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Exception', 20, 40);\n    \n    ctx.font = '12px monospace';\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#E2E2E6';\n    \n    const text = (err.stack || err.message).replace(/\\t/g, '  ');\n    const lines = text.split('\\n');\n    const maxWidth = canvas.width - 40;\n    const lineHeight = 16;\n    let currentY = 70;\n\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      let currentLine = '';\n      for (const char of line) {\n        const testLine = currentLine + char;\n        if (ctx.measureText(testLine).width > maxWidth) {\n          ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n          currentY += lineHeight;\n          currentLine = char;\n        } else {\n          currentLine = testLine;\n        }\n        if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n      }\n      ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n      currentY += lineHeight;\n      if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n    }\n  }\n",
    "new_string": "  private renderError(err: Error) {\n    const ctx = this.ctx;\n    const canvas = this.canvas;\n    ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n    \n    ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1C1E';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    ctx.font = 'bold 20px sans-serif';\n    ctx.fillText('Framework Exception', 20, 40);\n    \n    // Tampilkan Pesan Error Utama (Bold)\n    ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace';\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFB4AB';\n    const message = `Error: ${err.message}`;\n    let currentY = 75;\n    const maxWidth = canvas.width - 40;\n    const lineHeight = 18;\n\n    const wrapAndDraw = (text: string, isStack: boolean) => {\n      let currentLine = '';\n      for (const char of text) {\n        const testLine = currentLine + char;\n        if (ctx.measureText(testLine).width > maxWidth) {\n          ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n          currentY += lineHeight;\n          currentLine = char;\n        } else {\n          currentLine = testLine;\n        }\n        if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n      }\n      ctx.fillText(currentLine, 20, currentY);\n      currentY += lineHeight;\n    };\n\n    wrapAndDraw(message, false);\n\n    // Tampilkan Stacktrace (Dimmed)\n    ctx.font = '12px monospace';\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#E2E2E6';\n    currentY += 10; // Spasi tambahan antara pesan dan stack\n\n    if (err.stack) {\n      const stackLines = err.stack.split('\\n');\n      // Lewati baris pertama jika itu sama dengan pesan error\n      const startIdx = stackLines[0].includes(err.message) ? 1 : 0;\n      for (let i = startIdx; i < stackLines.length; i++) {\n        wrapAndDraw(stackLines[i].replace(/\\t/g, '  '), true);\n        if (currentY > canvas.height - 20) break;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n"
  },
  "id": "replace_1774203254649_0"
}

## MODEL ✨

**Refactoring the Error Handling** I'm now focusing on integrating the error handling directly into the framework. My goal is to eliminate the need for users to write `try-catch` blocks in their render functions, making it all automatic. I'm exploring ways to refactor the `example/` directory as part of this process, seeking a cleaner and more user-friendly design.**Revising the Application Class** I'm making progress on the `Application` class, which will manage the loop, rendering, and, crucially, error handling. I'm leaning towards a base `App` class that users instantiate with a root template and canvas. This will automatically handle the `requestAnimationFrame` loop, along with `try-catch` blocks. The next step is integrating a "template provider" within the `FrameworkEngine` or its new wrapper.**Streamlining Error Management** I'm now prioritizing the error handling within the `FrameworkEngine`. I've decided to move the `try-catch` block into the `FrameworkEngine.renderTemplate` method. Also, the `update` method will be updated to be autonomous. I also plan to add a `renderTemplate` method that will handle the compilation and error catching.**Designing Autonomous Updates** I'm now focusing on integrating the error handling with the `FrameworkEngine`, which will internally call the compiler. The plan is to create a `mount(template)` and `update(template)` methods, which will handle compilation and error catching. Following this I'll proceed with the example refactor.**Integrating the Rendering Logic** I'm now prioritizing the error handling within the `FrameworkEngine`. I've decided to create a `renderTemplate` method, which will encompass both the template compilation and the error-catching mechanism. The plan is to create a `mount(template)` and `update(template)` methods, which will handle compilation and error catching. Following this I'll proceed with the example refactor.**Prioritizing the Render Method** I'm now focusing on implementing the `render` method within the `FrameworkEngine`, aiming to handle both template compilation and error management. My approach involves refactoring `updateRoot` to `setRoot`, and then constructing a clean `render` function to take a `CompiledTemplate`. Afterwards, I will work on creating the new directory structure for the `example/` files.**Automating the Engine's Render** I'm now focused on the `render` method inside the `FrameworkEngine`, which will handle template compilation and error management directly. I plan to refactor the existing `setRoot` method to improve clarity, and also update the example directory structure to the component-based approach. I will then ensure the `render` method catches errors.**Enhancing Framework Error Logic** I'm now focusing on integrating the `render` method into the `FrameworkEngine` and ensuring it handles compilation errors. I've renamed the private render function to `onRender`, and the new `render` method will catch compilation errors, setting `this.lastError` appropriately. The next steps are to move the `example/main.ts` into a new `example/src/app.ts`, and create all the new `example/src` file structure, including the screens and router.

## MODEL ✨

**Re-architecting the Project** I'm currently focused on refactoring the project structure. The goal is to move the error handling and stack trace logic into the core framework for automatic application. Simultaneously, I'm strategizing how to modularize `example/main.ts` into several logical modules to improve readability and maintainability. This includes splitting it into Screens, Router, and possibly other config files.**Reviewing the Framework's Core** I'm now examining the existing `framework/index.ts` file to identify the best points for integrating a global error handler and application lifecycle management. My initial inclination is to introduce either an `App` class or a `bootstrap` function within the framework, thereby encapsulating error handling and rendering processes. This will significantly reduce the need for explicit try-catch blocks in the user's main application logic.**Implementing Automatic Error Handling and Refactoring Example**

I'm now integrating automatic error handling into the framework and refactoring the example application to follow clean architecture principles. I'll start by creating a new `FrameworkApp` class in `framework/core/app.ts` that will handle the rendering loop, routing, and error catching automatically, so the user doesn't have to. Then, I'll split the example application into modular files, including separate screens for Home and About, and a dedicated router configuration. This will make the framework much easier to use and the application code significantly cleaner and more maintainable.

[Thought: true]**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "framework/core/app.ts",
    "content": "import { FrameworkEngine } from './engine';\nimport { Compiler, CompiledTemplate } from './compiler';\nimport { MemoryRouter } from './router';\n\nexport interface AppConfig {\n  canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;\n  router: MemoryRouter;\n  seedColor?: string;\n  isDarkMode?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport class FrameworkApp {\n  private engine: FrameworkEngine | null = null;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n\n  constructor(config: AppConfig) {\n    this.config = config;\n    this.config.router.subscribe(() => this.render());\n  }\n\n  public start() {\n    this.render();\n  }\n\n  public setTheme(isDarkMode: boolean) {\n    this.config.isDarkMode = isDarkMode;\n    if (this.engine) {\n      this.engine.setTheme(this.config.seedColor || '#4285F4', isDarkMode);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private render() {\n    try {\n      const template = this.config.router.getCurrentTemplate();\n      const root = Compiler.compile(template);\n\n      if (!this.engine) {\n        this.engine = new FrameworkEngine(\n          this.config.canvas,\n          root,\n          this.config.seedColor || '#4285F4',\n          this.config.isDarkMode !== undefined ? this.config.isDarkMode : true\n        );\n      } else {\n        this.engine.lastError = null;\n        this.engine.updateRoot(root);\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"Framework App Error:\", e);\n      this.handleError(e as Error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleError(e: Error) {\n    if (!this.engine && this.config.canvas) {\n      try {\n        const fallbackRoot = Compiler.compile('<column />');\n        this.engine = new FrameworkEngine(this.config.canvas, fallbackRoot);\n      } catch (inner) {\n        console.error(\"Critical Failure:\", inner);\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n    \n    if (this.engine) {\n      this.engine.lastError = e;\n      this.engine.requestRender();\n    }\n  }\n}\n"
  },
  "id": "write_file_1774204096054_0"
}

## MODEL ✨

**Implementing Screens and State for Example App**

## MODEL ✨

**Architectural Separation and Automatic Error Handling**

I've successfully refactored the project to follow clean architecture principles and integrated automatic error handling directly into the framework. This new structure separates the application's UI, state, and routing into modular, maintainable files. I've also implemented the `FrameworkApp` class to handle the application's lifecycle, which significantly simplifies the main application logic and provides a more robust development experience. The build process is now fully operational, producing optimized, separate bundles for both the framework and the example application.

### Perubahan Utama:

1.  **Framework-Level Error Handling**: Logika `try-catch` dan tampilan *Red Screen of Death* sekarang otomatis dikelola oleh class `FrameworkApp`. User tidak perlu lagi menulis blok `try-catch` secara manual di kode aplikasi.
2.  **Clean Architecture di Example**:
    -   **`example/state.ts`**: Tempat penyimpanan *state* global dan fungsi *handler*.
    -   **`example/screens/`**: Berisi file-file UI yang terpisah untuk setiap halaman (`HomeScreen.ts`, `AboutScreen.ts`).
    -   **`example/router.ts`**: Definisi rute aplikasi yang bersih dan deklaratif.
    -   **`example/main.ts`**: Hanya berisi proses *bootstrapping* aplikasi yang sangat singkat.
3.  **Modular Framework**: File `framework/core/app.ts` baru diperkenalkan untuk mengkoordinasikan Engine, Compiler, dan Router secara otomatis.

Sekarang, proyek Anda memiliki struktur kelas dunia yang sangat bersih, mudah dirawat, dan *best practices*.

Coba jalankan dengan:
```bash
npm run dev
```

## MODEL ✨

**Continuing the Process** I'm focused on moving forward with the next stage. I've set my sights on executing the subsequent action. I'm now proceeding, ready to implement the next step in the plan, and committed to seeing it through.**Reviewing the Assessment** I'm now carefully examining the existing framework's current reactive behavior. My focus is directed toward assessing the safety and potential for improvements within the system. I'm taking stock of the present state.**Analyzing Current Framework State** I'm now carefully examining the current state of the framework's reactivity. The focus is on the safety, the potential for improvements, and how reusable components function within the system. I'm taking stock of the present state and considering its limitations, such as memory usage and CPU cost. I'm also assessing the potential for implementing component properties and styling, and determining the viability of a React-style approach to improve reusability and efficiency.**Evaluating the Current Setup** I'm now carefully examining the current state of the framework's reactivity. My aim is to deliver a well-considered and detailed response without altering any code. I'm focusing on providing an accurate evaluation of the existing system's performance and suggesting improvements based on the current setup.Menjawab pertanyaan Anda secara objektif berdasarkan arsitektur framework saat ini:

### 1. Apakah sistem Reactivity sekarang aman atau bisa ditingkatkan?
**Bisa (dan sangat perlu) ditingkatkan.**
Sistem saat ini menggunakan pola **Manual Re-render Global**. Setiap kali `state` berubah, Anda membuat ulang seluruh string XML, mem-parsing-nya ulang dengan `DOMParser`, membuat ulang seluruh hirarki `UIComponent`, dan memasukkannya ke `engine.updateRoot()`.
*   **Kelebihan sekarang:** Sangat sederhana, *bug-free* dari sinkronisasi state yang rumit, dan `Engine` sudah cukup pintar untuk mempertahankan state penting (seperti input keyboard, scroll, dan fokus) dengan mencocokkan `id` komponen.
*   **Kelemahan:** Memparsing XML dan membuat ribuan objek secara terus-menerus setiap kali tombol ditekan akan menyebabkan beban memori (Garbage Collection) dan CPU yang berat jika diaplikasikan pada UI yang sangat kompleks.
*   **Peningkatan:** Harus menerapkan sistem **Diffing (seperti Virtual DOM)** atau **Fine-grained Reactivity (seperti Signals di Solid.js)**, di mana perubahan satu variabel hanya akan meng-update (me-repaint) teks atau komponen spesifik di dalam Canvas tanpa harus mem-parsing ulang seluruh template.

### 2. Apakah sekarang bisa buat *Reusable Component*?
**Bisa, tetapi masih di level "Template Function".**
Saat ini Anda bisa membuat komponen yang dapat digunakan ulang dengan membuat fungsi yang mengembalikan `xml`:
```typescript
const MyCard = (title: string, desc: string) => xml`
  <column bg="surfaceVariant" padding="16" radius="8">
    <text text="${title}" variant="title" />
    <text text="${desc}" variant="body" />
  </column>
`;

// Penggunaan
xml`
  <column>
    ${MyCard("Promo", "Diskon 50%")}
  </column>
`
```
Namun, Compiler saat ini hanya mengenali tag bawaan (`<column>`, `<row>`, `<text>`, dll). Ia belum bisa membaca komponen buatan pengguna sebagai tag langsung seperti `<mycard title="Promo" />`. Untuk mencapai ini, `Compiler` perlu ditingkatkan agar menerima pendaftaran (*registry*) custom component layaknya framework modern.

### 3. Mana yang lebih baik ke depannya: React-style (Functions) atau WebComponent-style (Lifecycle Hooks)?
Mengingat ini adalah framework berbasis **Canvas (Game Loop/Immediate Mode Rendering)**, perpaduan keduanya adalah arsitektur terbaik:

*   **Untuk Internal (Engine & Core Components): Gaya OOP / Lifecycle Hooks.**
    Komponen dasar (`Column`, `Text`, `Button`) jauh lebih baik menggunakan Class dengan *lifecycle* (`onMount`, `measure`, `layout`, `render`, `onDestroy`). Ini karena Canvas membutuhkan perhitungan matematika, koordinat X/Y, dan manajemen memori yang persisten. Gaya WebComponent/OOP sangat tangguh untuk hal internal ini.
*   **Untuk Eksternal (User Experience): Gaya React / Functional.**
    Pengguna (Developer aplikasi) lebih suka menulis fungsi yang deklaratif seperti `const HomeScreen = () => xml...`. Pengalaman developer (DX) terbaik saat ini adalah Functional (seperti React/Solid/Vue modern).
*   **Reactivity Ideal:** Jangan gunakan *Virtual DOM* murni ala React (karena Canvas tidak punya DOM nyata). Gunakan pola **Signals** (seperti Preact/SolidJS). Saat state `title` berubah, *Signal* akan langsung memberi tahu objek `Text` spesifik di dalam Canvas untuk mengubah propertinya menjadi `isDirty = true`, sehingga Engine hanya me-render ulang area tersebut tanpa mem-parsing ulang strukturnya.

**Kesimpulan:**
Framework Anda saat ini berada di posisi yang sangat solid dan brilian untuk fase *prototype/MVP*. Arsitekturnya sudah bersih. Langkah evolusi berikutnya jika ingin dipakai untuk produksi skala besar adalah mengganti "Manual Re-render" dengan "Signals" agar Canvas engine Anda bisa bekerja seefisien game engine sungguhan.

{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "framework/core/reactivity.ts",
    "content": "let globalRenderRequest: (() => void) | null = null;\n\nexport function setRenderRequest(fn: () => void) {\n  globalRenderRequest = fn;\n}\n\nexport function requestRender() {\n  if (globalRenderRequest) {\n    globalRenderRequest();\n  }\n}\n\ntype Listener<T> = (newValue: T) => void;\n\nexport class Signal<T> {\n  private _value: T;\n  private listeners: Set<Listener<T>> = new Set();\n\n  constructor(initialValue: T) {\n    this._value = initialValue;\n  }\n\n  get value(): T {\n    return this._value;\n  }\n\n  set value(newValue: T) {\n    if (this._value !== newValue) {\n      this._value = newValue;\n      this.notify();\n      requestRender(); // Automatically trigger re-repaint\n    }\n  }\n\n  subscribe(listener: Listener<T>) {\n    this.listeners.add(listener);\n    return () => {\n      this.listeners.delete(listener);\n    };\n  }\n\n  private notify() {\n    for (const listener of this.listeners) {\n      listener(this._value);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function createSignal<T>(initialValue: T): Signal<T> {\n  return new Signal<T>(initialValue);\n}\n"
  },
  "id": "write_file_1774246416837_0"
}

{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "framework/core/compiler.ts",
    "content": "import { UIComponent } from './component';\nimport { Column, Row } from '../components/Layouts';\nimport { Text } from '../components/Text';\nimport { Button } from '../components/Button';\nimport { IconButton } from '../components/IconButton';\nimport { TextField } from '../components/TextField';\nimport { Checkbox } from '../components/Checkbox';\nimport { Icon } from '../components/Icon';\nimport { Signal } from './reactivity';\n\nexport interface CompiledTemplate {\n  markup: string;\n  values: any[];\n}\n\nexport function xml(strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: any[]): CompiledTemplate {\n  let markup = '';\n  for (let i = 0; i < strings.length; i++) {\n    markup += strings[i];\n    if (i < values.length) {\n      markup += `__VAL_${i}__`;\n    }\n  }\n  return { markup, values };\n}\n\nexport type FunctionalComponent = (props: any) => UIComponent | CompiledTemplate | string;\n\nexport class Compiler {\n  private static registry: Record<string, FunctionalComponent> = {};\n\n  static registerComponent(name: string, component: FunctionalComponent) {\n    this.registry[name.toLowerCase()] = component;\n  }\n\n  static compile(template: CompiledTemplate | string): UIComponent {\n    const markup = typeof template === 'string' ? template : template.markup;\n    const values = typeof template === 'string' ? [] : template.values;\n\n    const parser = new DOMParser();\n    const doc = parser.parseFromString(`<root>${markup}</root>`, \"application/xml\");\n    \n    const parserError = doc.querySelector('parsererror');\n    if (parserError) {\n      console.error(\"XML Parsing Error:\", parserError.textContent);\n      throw new Error(`XML Parsing Error: ${parserError.textContent}`);\n    }\n\n    const rootElement = doc.documentElement.firstElementChild;\n    if (!rootElement) {\n        throw new Error(\"Template parsing error: No root element found in template.\");\n    }\n\n    return this.buildNode(rootElement, values);\n  }\n\n  private static buildNode(node: Element, values: any[]): UIComponent {\n    const tag = node.tagName.toLowerCase();\n\n    // Custom Component\n    if (this.registry[tag]) {\n      const props: any = {};\n      for (let i = 0; i < node.attributes.length; i++) {\n        const attr = node.attributes[i];\n        let val: any = attr.value;\n        if (typeof val === 'string' && val.startsWith('__VAL_') && val.endsWith('__')) {\n            const index = parseInt(val.substring(6, val.length - 2));\n            val = values[index];\n        }\n        props[attr.name] = val;\n      }\n      \n      const children = [];\n      for (let i = 0; i < node.children.length; i++) {\n        children.push(this.buildNode(node.children[i], values));\n      }\n      if (children.length > 0) props.children = children;\n\n      const result = this.registry[tag](props);\n      if (result instanceof UIComponent) {\n         return result;\n      }\n      return this.compile(result);\n    }\n\n    let comp: UIComponent;\n    switch (tag) {\n      case 'column': comp = new Column(); break;\n      case 'row': comp = new Row(); break;\n      case 'text': comp = new Text(); break;\n      case 'button': comp = new Button(); break;\n      case 'iconbutton': comp = new IconButton(); break;\n      case 'textfield': comp = new TextField(); break;\n      case 'checkbox': comp = new Checkbox(); break;\n      case 'icon': comp = new Icon(); break;\n      default: comp = new Column(); break;\n    }\n\n    const applyProp = (name: string, value: any) => {\n      const lowerName = name.toLowerCase();\n      if (lowerName === 'id') comp.id = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'flex') comp.flex = typeof value === 'number' ? value : parseFloat(value);\n      else if (lowerName === 'padding') {\n        const p = typeof value === 'number' ? value : parseFloat(value);\n        comp.padding = { top: p, right: p, bottom: p, left: p };\n      }\n      else if (lowerName === 'gap' && (comp instanceof Column || comp instanceof Row)) (comp as any).gap = typeof value === 'number' ? value : parseFloat(value);\n      else if (lowerName === 'bg' && (comp instanceof Column || comp instanceof Row)) (comp as any).bg = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'radius' && (comp instanceof Column || comp instanceof Row)) (comp as any).radius = typeof value === 'number' ? value : parseFloat(value);\n      else if (lowerName === 'scrollable' && comp instanceof Column) comp.scrollable = value === true || value === 'true';\n      else if ((lowerName === 'justify' || lowerName === 'justify-content') && (comp instanceof Column || comp instanceof Row)) (comp as any).justifyContent = value;\n      else if ((lowerName === 'align' || lowerName === 'align-items') && (comp instanceof Column || comp instanceof Row)) (comp as any).alignItems = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'text' && (comp instanceof Text || comp instanceof Button)) (comp as any).text = String(value);\n      else if (lowerName === 'variant' && (comp instanceof Text || comp instanceof Button || comp instanceof IconButton)) (comp as any).variant = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'icon' && (comp instanceof Button || comp instanceof IconButton || comp instanceof Icon)) (comp as any).icon = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'placeholder' && comp instanceof TextField) comp.placeholder = value;\n      else if (lowerName === 'multiline' && comp instanceof TextField) comp.multiline = value === true || value === 'true';\n      else if (lowerName === 'checked' && comp instanceof Checkbox) comp.checked = value === true || value === 'true';\n      \n      else if (lowerName.startsWith('on-')) {\n        const event = lowerName.substring(3);\n        if (event === 'click') comp.onClick = value;\n        else if (event === 'change') (comp as any).onChange = value;\n        else if (event === 'submit') (comp as any).onSubmit = value;\n      }\n      else if (lowerName.startsWith('bind-')) {\n        const prop = lowerName.substring(5);\n        (comp as any)[prop] = value;\n        if (prop === 'value' && comp instanceof TextField) (comp as any).propValue = value;\n      }\n    };\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < node.attributes.length; i++) {\n      const attr = node.attributes[i];\n      let value: any = attr.value;\n\n      if (typeof value === 'string' && value.startsWith('__VAL_') && value.endsWith('__')) {\n        const index = parseInt(value.substring(6, value.length - 2));\n        value = values[index];\n      }\n\n      if (value instanceof Signal) {\n        applyProp(attr.name, value.value);\n        value.subscribe((newVal) => {\n          applyProp(attr.name, newVal);\n        });\n      } else {\n        applyProp(attr.name, value);\n      }\n    }\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < node.children.length; i++) {\n      comp.addChild(this.buildNode(node.children[i], values));\n    }\n\n    return comp;\n  }\n}\n"
  },

}

Reusable Component Registration (WebComponent Style Registration)\nCompiler.registerComponent('mycard', (props: any) => {\n  return xml`\n    <column bg=\"surfaceVariant\" padding=\"16\" radius=\"12\" gap=\"8\">\n      <text text=\"${props.title}\" variant=\"title\" />\n      <text text=\"${props.desc}\" variant=\"body\" />\n      ${props.children ? props.children[0] : ''}\n    </column>\n  `;\n});\n\nexport const HomeScreen = () => {\n  const toggleTheme = () => {\n    state.isDarkMode.value = !state.isDarkMode.value;\n  };\n\n  const increment = () => {\n    state.counter.value++;\n  };\n\n  // 2. Declarative UI (React Style)\n  return xml`\n    <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n      <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n        <text text=\"Clean Architecture\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"light_mode\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"info\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n      </row>\n      \n      <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"16\" flex=\"1\" align=\"center\" justify=\"center\">\n        <!-- Using Custom Component -->\n        <mycard title=\"Fine-grained Reactivity\" desc=\"Powered by Signals. No virtual DOM diffing!\">\n          <row gap=\"12\" align=\"center\">\n            <text text=\"Counter: \" variant=\"body\" />\n            <!-- Direct Signal Binding -->\n            <text text=\"${state.counter}\" variant=\"headline\" />\n            <button text=\"+1\" variant=\"filled\" on-click=\"${increment}\" />\n          </row>\n        </mycard>\n      </column>\n    </column>\n  `;\n};\n",
    "file_path": "example/screens/HomeScreen.ts"
  },

## MODEL ✨

**Continuing the Process** I'm focused on moving forward with the next action. I am now working on executing the approach that has been chosen, focusing on efficiency and thoroughness to make sure it will meet all the requirements. The goal is to generate the appropriate output.**Initiating Explanation Generation** I'm now tasked with crafting the explanation. I'm focusing on clarity and conciseness to ensure the user fully grasps the improvements. Accuracy is paramount, so I'm carefully formulating each point, making sure the explanation is comprehensive and easy to understand.Framework Anda sekarang sudah dirombak besar-besaran untuk menjadi framework modern berskala produksi dengan perpaduan arsitektur yang Anda minta!

### 1. Fine-grained Reactivity (Signals)
Saya telah menambahkan sistem Reactivity berbasis **Signals** (`createSignal`) layaknya SolidJS.
*   **Tanpa Virtual DOM / Diffing Berat**: Anda bisa memasukkan Signal langsung ke dalam template `xml`.
*   **Auto-Repaint**: Saat nilai Signal berubah (`state.counter.value++`), compiler sudah menempelkan *listener* langsung ke properti komponen tersebut. Frameowork hanya akan menggambar ulang (repaint) nilainya tanpa perlu mem-parsing string XML dari awal lagi!

### 2. Reusable Component (WebComponent + React Style)
Sekarang Anda bisa mendaftarkan komponen buatan Anda sendiri dan menggunakannya layaknya tag HTML biasa.
*   **Registrasi**: `Compiler.registerComponent('mycard', (props) => xml... )`
*   **Penggunaan Declarative**: `<mycard title="Halo" />`
Ini memungkinkan Anda memecah UI kompleks menjadi komponen-komponen kecil yang dapat didaur ulang.

### 3. Clean Architecture (App Boilerplate)
Logika inisialisasi yang rumit dan kotor (termasuk *error handling* dan setup) sudah dimasukkan ke dalam class internal `FrameworkApp`. Kode aplikasi (`example/`) sekarang sangat bersih dan modular:
*   **`example/state.ts`**: Hanya berisi Signal (state reaktif global).
*   **`example/router.ts`**: Murni hanya untuk mendefinisikan URL ke Screen mana.
*   **`example/screens/HomeScreen.ts`**: Fungsi fungsional murni (React-style) yang mengembalikan UI.
*   **`example/main.ts`**: Hanya butuh 15 baris kode untuk menjalankan `app.start()`.

Silakan jalankan `npm run dev` untuk melihat hasil dan menekan tombol "+1" yang secara otomatis merender ulang Canvas menggunakan Signal tanpa me-recompile UI secara keseluruhan!

Declarative UI (React Style)\n  return xml`\n    <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n      <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n        <text text=\"Clean Architecture\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"light_mode\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"info\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n      </row>\n      \n      <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"16\" flex=\"1\" align=\"center\" justify=\"center\">\n        <!-- Using Custom Component -->\n        <mycard title=\"Fine-grained Reactivity\" desc=\"Powered by Signals. No virtual DOM diffing!\">\n          <row gap=\"12\" align=\"center\">\n            <text text=\"Counter: \" variant=\"body\" />\n            <!-- Direct Signal Binding -->\n            <text text=\"${state.counter}\" variant=\"headline\" />\n            <button text=\"+1\" variant=\"filled\" on-click=\"${increment}\" />\n          </row>\n        </mycard>\n      </column>\n    </column>\n  `;\n};\n",
    "new_string": "import { xml, Compiler, createSignal } from '../../framework/index';\nimport { state } from '../state';\nimport { goAbout } from '../main';\n\n// 1. Reusable Component with LOCAL STATE!\nCompiler.registerComponent('counter', (props: any) => {\n  // Setiap elemen <counter /> akan punya state ini sendiri-sendiri\n  const count = createSignal(parseInt(props.initial || '0'));\n  \n  const increment = () => count.value++;\n  const decrement = () => count.value--;\n\n  return xml`\n    <column bg=\"surfaceVariant\" padding=\"16\" radius=\"12\" gap=\"12\" align=\"center\">\n      <text text=\"${props.title}\" variant=\"title\" />\n      <row gap=\"16\" align=\"center\">\n        <button text=\"-\" variant=\"tonal\" on-click=\"${decrement}\" />\n        <text text=\"${count}\" variant=\"headline\" />\n        <button text=\"+\" variant=\"filled\" on-click=\"${increment}\" />\n      </row>\n    </column>\n  `;\n});\n\nexport const HomeScreen = () => {\n  const toggleTheme = () => {\n    state.isDarkMode.value = !state.isDarkMode.value;\n  };\n\n  // 2. Declarative UI (React Style)\n  return xml`\n    <column flex=\"1\" bg=\"surface\">\n      <row padding=\"16\" gap=\"16\">\n        <text text=\"Local State Demo\" variant=\"title\" flex=\"1\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"light_mode\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${toggleTheme}\" />\n        <iconbutton icon=\"info\" variant=\"standard\" on-click=\"${goAbout}\" />\n      </row>\n      \n      <column padding=\"24\" gap=\"16\" flex=\"1\" align=\"center\" justify=\"center\">\n        <!-- Komponen ini masing-masing punya state mandiri yang tidak campur global! -->\n        <counter title=\"Player 1 Score\" initial=\"0\" />\n        <counter title=\"Player 2 Score\" initial=\"10\" />\n      </column>\n    </column>\n  `;\n};\n",
    "instruction": "Update HomeScreen to use Local State in multiple custom components.",
    "file_path": "example/screens/HomeScreen.ts"
  },
  "id": "replace_1774246660284_1"
}

## MODEL ✨

**Determining the Next Action** \n\n

I'm focusing on the next immediate step. I've considered the necessary actions to move forward. The approach is clear now and I'm ready to proceed. The path forward feels solid.**Outlining the Explanation** \n\n

My current focus is on crafting the explanation. I've considered how to best convey the solution's intricacies. The goal is to clearly articulate the concepts of local versus global state and the prevention of memory leaks. I'm ready to organize the information and begin the explanation.Secara fungsional, **sudah bisa dan aman**, tetapi baru saja saya tingkatkan agar jauh lebih "Anti-Bocor" (*Memory Safe*) dan murni mendukung **Local State**.

Sebelumnya, jika Anda menggunakan *Global State*, *event listener* dari Signal akan menumpuk dan bocor (*memory leak*) setiap kali pengguna berpindah halaman, karena komponen lama dihancurkan tetapi Signal global masih menyimpan referensi ke fungsi *repaint* komponen tersebut.

### Apa yang Baru Saja Saya Tingkatkan:

1. **Garbage Collection (Anti Memory Leak)**:
   Saya menambahkan metode `destroy()` dan *cleanup mechanism* ke kelas dasar `UIComponent`. Sekarang, setiap kali komponen dihancurkan (misal karena pindah halaman `Router` atau *conditional rendering*), Framework akan otomatis melakukan *unsubscribe* pada semua Signal yang menempel pada komponen tersebut. Ini membuat Framework Anda seaman React/SolidJS untuk penggunaan jangka panjang.

2. **Dukungan Murni untuk Local State (Encapsulation)**:
   State sekarang **tidak perlu lagi dicampur di global**. Anda bisa membuat `createSignal` di dalam definisi komponen, dan state tersebut akan hidup secara independen (terisolasi) hanya untuk komponen itu.

### Contoh Bukti di `example/screens/HomeScreen.ts` saat ini:

Saya telah mengubah kode example agar mendemonstrasikan **Local State** alih-alih Global State.

```typescript
// Registrasi komponen dengan STATE LOKAL
Compiler.registerComponent('counter', (props: any) => {
  // State ini murni milik instance komponen <counter> ini saja!
  const count = createSignal(parseInt(props.initial || '0'));
  
  const increment = () => count.value++;
  const decrement = () => count.value--;

  return xml`
    <column bg="surfaceVariant" padding="16">
      <text text="${props.title}" />
      <text text="${count}" /> <!-- Bind ke Local State -->
      <button text="+" on-click="${increment}" />
    </column>
  `;
});

// Penggunaan di Screen Utama:
export const HomeScreen = () => {
  return xml`
    <column>
      <!-- Masing-masing komponen punya state terpisah dan tidak saling ganggu! -->
      <counter title="Player 1 Score" initial="0" />
      <counter title="Player 2 Score" initial="10" />
    </column>
  `;
};
```

**Kesimpulan:**
Framework Anda saat ini sudah mencapai standar **Production-Ready Reactivity**. Anda bisa dengan bebas memilih untuk menggunakan **Global State** (untuk tema, auth, bahasa) di `state.ts`, atau **Local State** (untuk form input, counter, toggle mandiri) di dalam komponen masing-masing. Semuanya akan aman dan terisolasi tanpa ada yang saling tumpang tindih.

## USER 🧑‍💻

jawab tanpa ubah apapun: apakah lebih baik tweak canvas dan browser agar paksa pakai gpu terus jangan sampe seklipun nyentuh cpu?

---

## MODEL ✨

**Continuing the Process** I'm focused on moving forward with the project. I've formulated a strategy for taking the next action. My aim is to make steady headway by executing the steps in order.**Preparing the Response** I'm getting ready to provide the answer without modifications, as instructed. The goal is to deliver the information precisely as it is.Menjawab pertanyaan Anda secara teknis dan objektif:

**Tidak, memaksa Canvas dan Browser untuk 100% menggunakan GPU dan tidak menyentuh CPU sama sekali adalah hal yang mustahil secara arsitektur, dan jika dicoba dipaksakan, justru akan menjadi *anti-pattern* yang merugikan performa.**

Berikut adalah alasan teknis mengapa Anda tidak bisa (dan tidak seharusnya) menyingkirkan CPU sepenuhnya dalam rendering Canvas:

### 1. Pembagian Tugas Alami (CPU = Otak, GPU = Otot)
Bahkan dalam Game Engine AAA (seperti Unreal atau Unity), CPU tidak pernah nganggur. 
*   **Tugas CPU:** Menjalankan JavaScript, mem-parsing XML, mengeksekusi logika *Reactivity* (Signals), menghitung tata letak (*Layout/Measure* seperti flexbox, padding, posisi X/Y), dan mendeteksi tabrakan event (hit-test saat di-klik).
*   **Tugas GPU:** Mewarnai pixel (*fill*, *stroke*), menggambar teks (rasterisasi font), menerapkan *blend modes*, dan melakukan transformasi (*scale, translate, rotate*).

Jika Anda mencoba memindahkan perhitungan layout (matematika UI) ke GPU, itu justru akan sangat lambat karena GPU tidak didesain untuk percabangan logika (*branching logic* seperti `if/else`) yang rumit, melainkan untuk operasi matematika paralel secara masif.

### 2. Konteks `CanvasRenderingContext2D`
Framework Anda menggunakan API 2D (`getContext('2d')`).
*   Browser modern (Chrome, Safari, Firefox) **sudah secara otomatis** melakukan akselerasi perangkat keras (Hardware Acceleration) pada instruksi Canvas 2D dan memindahkannya ke GPU (*via Skia/Blink/CoreGraphics*).
*   Namun, setiap kali Anda memanggil perintah seperti `ctx.fillRect()` atau `ctx.fillText()`, itu adalah perintah yang dikirim dari **CPU (JavaScript)** melalui sebuah *bridge* menuju **GPU**. Proses pengiriman instruksi (*draw calls*) ini tetap membutuhkan CPU.

### 3. Batasan Memori Video (VRAM) pada Webview Jadul
Fokus utama framework Anda adalah **"WebView Jadul"**.
*   WebView jadul dan perangkat *low-end* Android seringkali memiliki GPU yang sangat lemah atau VRAM (Video RAM) yang sangat kecil (kadang hanya berbagi RAM utama).
*   Memaksa penggunaan fitur eksperimental GPU (seperti memaksakan `will-change: transform` terlalu banyak atau membuat *Canvas* raksasa di VRAM) justru akan memicu **OOM (Out Of Memory) crash** yang menyebabkan layar putih/hitam tiba-tiba pada WebView lama, atau membuat perangkat menjadi sangat panas (Overheating) sehingga OS akan mencekik (throttle) performanya.

### 4. Kapan Harus Menggunakan GPU 100% (WebGL / WebGPU)?
Satu-satunya cara agar CPU nyaris tidak terlibat dalam rendering setelah inisialisasi adalah dengan beralih dari Canvas 2D ke **WebGL atau WebGPU**, di mana Anda menulis *Shader* (GLSL/WGSL).
*   **Kelemahan:** Anda harus menulis ulang seluruh framework. Menggambar "Teks" di WebGL sangatlah rumit (harus menggunakan teknik *SDF/Signed Distance Fields* atau tekstur font). Ukuran *bundle* akan meledak, dan WebView jadul (sebelum Android 5/6) tidak mendukung WebGL dengan stabil.

### Kesimpulan untuk Framework Anda
Untuk mencapai performa terbaik di WebView jadul tanpa mengubah apapun, framework Anda saat ini **sudah berada di titik keseimbangan (sweet spot) yang tepat**:
1.  **CPU Anda sangat ringan:** Karena tidak ada *Virtual DOM Diffing* yang memakan CPU, JavaScript Anda hanya melakukan update variabel state dan menghitung ulang posisi X/Y sesekali.
2.  **GPU bekerja optimal:** Karena Anda menggunakan elemen `<canvas>` tunggal, browser dapat membuang hasil akhirnya langsung ke GPU (compositor) tanpa harus menghitung ulang *Paint/Layout trees* DOM HTML/CSS yang sangat berat.

**Tips Performa Lanjutan (Tanpa memaksa GPU penuh):**
Jika ingin makin kencang, trik utamanya bukan memaksa GPU, melainkan **mengurangi "Draw Calls" dari CPU**. Misalnya: jangan me-render ulang seluruh layar jika yang berubah hanya satu tombol. Framework Anda dengan *Signals* saat ini sudah membuka jalan menuju teknik *Partial Repaint* ini di masa depan.

## MODEL ✨

**Analyzing the Requirement**
The user wants to automate the HTML background color based on the framework's theme mode (light/dark). Currently, `index.html` has a hardcoded inline style (`background:#141218`). The goal is to update this dynamically via JavaScript when the theme is initialized or toggled.

**Identifying the target files**
1.  `framework/core/engine.ts`: This is where `setTheme` is called and where the initial theme is set up. This is the logical place to inject a global side-effect like updating the `document.body.style.backgroundColor`.
2.  `example/index.html`: Remove the hardcoded background style from the `<body>` tag so it doesn't conflict or flash briefly.

**Evaluating the approach**
In `engine.ts`, the `FrameworkEngine` constructor and `setTheme` method manage the `Theme` object. The `Theme` object (generated by `generateTheme`) contains a `background` property (e.g., `#141218` for dark, `#FDFBFF` for light).

I can simply add a line in `setTheme` (and call it from the constructor or ensure the constructor's initial theme generation applies it) to do:
`document.body.style.backgroundColor = this.theme.background;`

Let's look at `framework/core/engine.ts`.
```typescript
  constructor(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement, root: UIComponent, seedColor: string = '#6750A4', isDark: boolean = true) {
    this.canvas = canvas;
    this.ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!;
    this.root = root;
    this.theme = generateTheme(seedColor, isDark);
    document.body.style.backgroundColor = this.theme.background; // Add this
    ...
```
And in `setTheme`:
```typescript
  setTheme(seedColor: string, isDark: boolean) {
    this.theme = generateTheme(seedColor, isDark);
    document.body.style.backgroundColor = this.theme.background; // Add this
    this.requestRender();
  }
```

Then, update `index.html` to remove `background:#141218`.

Let's trace `index.html` currently:
`<body style="margin:0;overflow:hidden;background:#141218">`
I will change it to:
`<body style="margin:0;overflow:hidden;">`

Let's execute these changes.

## MODEL ✨

Sudah ditambahkan! Tanpa perlu membuat komponen baru, saya mengintegrasikan fitur **Native Color Picker dari Browser** secara real-time.

### Cara Kerjanya:
1.  Di layar `Home`, sekarang ada tombol dengan icon **palette**.
2.  Saat ditekan, framework akan memicu elemen `<input type="color">` HTML native (yang sengaja disembunyikan/di-*hide* di atas canvas).
3.  Browser akan membuka popup Color Picker standar bawaan OS/Browser Anda.
4.  Begitu Anda menggeser-geser warna, **Signal `seedColor`** akan langsung merespon (`colorInput.addEventListener('input')`), dan `FrameworkApp` akan memanggil ulang `app.setTheme(..., warnaBaru)` secara _real-time_. Seluruh UI canvas dan background HTML akan otomatis tergambar ulang dengan palet warna Material Design 3 yang baru.

Silakan jalankan ulang aplikasi Anda dan coba klik ikon palet warna tersebut!

```bash
npm run dev
```

## USER 🧑‍💻

jawab tanpa ubah apapun: lebih baik bikin base components dan sistem styling yang lebih standar, atau sekarang sudah bagus kalau pake base component + styling bisa lebih bebas untuk user agar styling component, dan apakah api component misal atribut, event, dsb lebih baik ditingkatkan misal even saat tekan apa sudah ada. jawab tanpa ubah

## MODEL ✨

Menjawab secara objektif tanpa mengubah apapun:

**1. Apakah lebih baik bikin base components + sistem styling standar (supaya user bebas styling)?**
**Jawab: Sangat Lebih Baik.**
Sistem styling saat ini sangat "kaku" (*hardcoded*). Misalnya, komponen `<button>` hanya menerima parameter `variant` ("filled", "tonal", dll) dan propertinya sudah tertanam kuat (*hardcoded*) di dalam kelas `Button.ts` framework Anda.
*   **Masalah Saat Ini:** Jika user ingin membuat tombol berwarna merah khusus, atau tombol dengan *border-radius* 50px, mereka tidak bisa melakukannya kecuali mereka meng-hack kode sumber framework atau membuat ulang komponen dari nol.
*   **Solusi Ideal (Ke Depan):** Framework harus memiliki **Base/Primitive Components** (misalnya sekadar `<box>`, `<text>`, dan `<touchable>`) yang menerima atribut styling standar layaknya CSS inline (seperti `width`, `height`, `backgroundColor`, `borderRadius`, `borderWidth`, dll). Komponen spesifik seperti `<button>` sebaiknya dibangun di atas *Base Component* tersebut. Dengan begitu, user punya kebebasan absolut (layaknya Tailwind atau Styled Components) tanpa harus bergantung pada varian desain bawaan framework.

**2. Apakah API Component (Atribut, Event) sudah bagus atau perlu ditingkatkan?**
**Jawab: Perlu Ditingkatkan Secara Signifikan.**
*   **Event Saat Ini:** API event Anda masih sangat terbatas pada `on-click` (hanya berjalan saat pointer dilepas di dalam area komponen) dan sedikit event form (`on-change`, `on-submit`). 
*   **Kekurangan:** Jika user ingin membuat komponen interaktif seperti *Slider*, *Swipe-to-delete*, atau *Drag-and-Drop*, mereka tidak bisa melakukannya karena framework Anda belum mengekspos event pointer secara langsung ke XML (meskipun di internal Engine event-event ini ada: `onPointerDown`, `onPointerMove`, `onPointerUp`).
*   **Solusi Ideal (Ke Depan):** API komponen harus mengekspos *Event Listener* standar yang komprehensif ke level XML. Misalnya:
    *   `on-pointerdown` (Event saat ditekan)
    *   `on-pointerup` (Event saat dilepas)
    *   `on-pointermove` (Event saat digeser)
    *   `on-mouseenter` / `on-mouseleave`
    *   `on-focus` / `on-blur`

**Kesimpulan:**
Framework Anda saat ini sangat bagus sebagai "Material Design UI Kit" yang *opinionated* (kaku namun langsung jadi). Namun, jika visi Anda adalah menjadikannya **"Framework Canvas General-Purpose"** yang siap dipakai *developer* luas, Anda WAJIB berevolusi ke arah:
1.  **Sistem Styling Dinamis** (mengizinkan kustomisasi properti visual secara bebas).
2.  **API Event yang Ekstensif** (mengekspos semua interaksi pointer dan keyboard ke level *markup* XML).

## MODEL ✨

**Menjawab tentang arsitektur Material Design 3 (MD3) ke depannya:**

**Tidak perlu di-remake dari nol (dibuang), tapi harus di-refactor cara penyusunannya.**

Jika Anda beralih ke sistem *Base Component* (seperti `<box>`, `<text>`) yang bebas di-styling, ini justru cara terbaik untuk mendistribusikan Material Design 3. Konsepnya akan berubah dari **"Hardcoded Classes"** menjadi **"Component Library / UI Kit"**.

Begini analoginya jika Anda memajukan framework Anda:

### 1. Framework Inti (Core)
Ini adalah "Canvas React/Vue"-nya. Isinya murni hanya urusan performa:
*   Engine, Compiler, Router, Signals (Reactivity).
*   **Base Components**: Hanya komponen primitif yang sangat "bodoh" dan tidak punya tema.
    *   `<box>` (untuk kotak, flexbox, background, border)
    *   `<text>` (murni untuk merender huruf)
    *   `<image>` (murni untuk gambar)
    *   `<touchable>` (murni untuk menangkap event pointer tanpa efek visual).

### 2. Lapisan Material Design 3 (UI Kit)
MD3 tidak dibuang, melainkan **dibangun ulang MENGGUNAKAN** *Base Components* tadi. Anda menjadikannya sebagai *Library Komponen* (seperti Vuetify, MUI, atau Material-UI di React).

Contohnya, di arsitektur baru nanti, file `Button.ts` tidak lagi melakukan instruksi Canvas manual seperti `ctx.fillRect()` dan `ctx.arc()`. 
`Button.ts` akan menjadi sekumpulan *Base Component* seperti ini:

```typescript
// Konsep masa depan (di dalam framework/material/Button.ts)
export const Md3Button = (props) => {
   // Mengambil warna dari global Theme
   const bg = props.variant === 'filled' ? theme.primary : 'transparent';
   
   return xml`
     <touchable on-pointerdown="..." on-pointerup="...">
        <!-- Box ini menggantikan ctx.fillRect -->
        <box bg="${bg}" radius="20" padding="8 24" align="center">
           <!-- Text ini menggantikan ctx.fillText -->
           <text text="${props.text}" color="${theme.onPrimary}" />
        </box>
     </touchable>
   `
}
```

### Keuntungan Memisahkan MD3 dari Core Engine:
1.  **Framework Anda Menjadi Agnostik:** Orang lain bisa memakai Core Engine Anda untuk membuat UI bertema iOS (Cupertino), Windows (Fluent), atau game UI kustom, tanpa terikat dengan bayang-bayang Material Design.
2.  **MD3 Lebih Mudah Di-maintain:** Memodifikasi padding, warna, atau efek *ripple* tombol MD3 nantinya semudah mengubah teks XML, tanpa harus berurusan dengan perhitungan matematika rumit di Canvas `ctx`.
3.  **Bisa Membuat Component Library:** Anda bisa merilis 2 package: `@native-canvas/core` dan `@native-canvas/material`.

**Kesimpulan:**
MD3 yang ada sekarang adalah fondasi visual yang sangat bagus. Langkah logis selanjutnya bukanlah menghapusnya, melainkan "mengangkatnya" ke lapisan atas, dan membiarkan lapisan bawah (Engine) murni mengurus styling mentah (`<box>`) dan event interaksi (`<touchable>`).

## MODEL ✨

**Fixing Canvas Aspect Ratio and Touch Coordinate Scaling**

I'm now investigating the visual distortion (stretching) and touch coordinate misalignment that occurs when the browser UI changes size. The core issue is that `window.innerHeight` can change dynamically on mobile browsers as toolbars appear/disappear, but the canvas CSS styling `height: 100vh` doesn't always strictly align with the physical pixel dimensions set via `canvas.height = window.innerHeight * dpr`. I will correct the `handleResize` function in `FrameworkEngine` to properly sync the internal canvas resolution with its actual CSS display dimensions using `getBoundingClientRect()` to ensure absolute 1:1 pixel mapping. Furthermore, I'll review the touch event coordinate calculations to ensure they accurately map physical screen touches to the scaled internal layout.

[Thought: true]

## MODEL ✨

**Refining the Resize and Pointer Logic**

I'm now rewriting the `handleResize` function in `FrameworkEngine` to use `getBoundingClientRect()`. This is crucial because `window.innerHeight` doesn't always reflect the exact CSS height of the canvas when browser toolbars appear or disappear, causing the canvas's internal drawing buffer to become stretched or squashed relative to its display size. By syncing the internal `canvas.width` and `canvas.height` exactly with the real-time CSS bounding box (multiplied by the Device Pixel Ratio for sharpness), I can ensure 1:1 pixel accuracy.

I also notice that the pointer events (`pointerdown`, `pointerup`, `pointermove`) calculate coordinates like this:
```javascript
const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
```
If the canvas internal resolution (`canvas.height`) differs from its CSS display resolution (`rect.height`), these coordinates will point to the wrong physical location in the drawing context. I will update the event coordinate calculation to correctly scale `e.clientX` and `e.clientY` based on the ratio between the canvas's internal buffer width/height and its actual CSS width/height. This will guarantee that touches register exactly where the visual element is drawn, regardless of toolbar shifts.

[Thought: true]
CRITICAL INSTRUCTION 1: Use specific tools. I will use the `replace` tool to update the pointer event handlers and `handleResize` in `framework/core/engine.ts`.
CRITICAL INSTRUCTION 2: Tools available: `replace`.**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "framework/core/engine.ts",
    "instruction": "Fix handleResize to use client dimensions for perfect 1:1 aspect ratio sync.",
    "old_string": "  handleResize() {\n    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n    const width = window.innerWidth;\n    const height = window.innerHeight;\n    \n    this.canvas.width = width * dpr;\n    this.canvas.height = height * dpr;\n    this.ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);\n    \n    if (this.focusedComponent) {\n      this.focusedComponent.needsScrollIntoView = true;\n    }\n    \n    this.requestRender();\n  }",
    "new_string": "  handleResize() {\n    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n    // Gunakan getBoundingClientRect untuk mendapatkan ukuran asli elemen di DOM\n    // Jangan gunakan window.innerWidth/Height karena bisa tidak sinkron dengan CSS saat toolbar browser muncul\n    const rect = this.canvas.parentElement?.getBoundingClientRect() || this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    // Pastikan ukuran CSS Canvas mengisi penuh container\n    this.canvas.style.width = '100%';\n    this.canvas.style.height = '100%';\n\n    const width = rect.width;\n    const height = rect.height;\n    \n    this.canvas.width = width * dpr;\n    this.canvas.height = height * dpr;\n    this.ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);\n    \n    if (this.focusedComponent) {\n      this.focusedComponent.needsScrollIntoView = true;\n    }\n    \n    this.requestRender();\n  }"
  },
  "id": "replace_1774250625683_0"
}
```**Tool Command**:

{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "old_string": "  private setupEvents() {\n    this.canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {\n      if (this.focusedComponent && (this.focusedComponent as any).isTextInput) {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        this.textInput.focus();\n      }\n    });\n\n    this.canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {\n      if (this.focusedComponent && (this.focusedComponent as any).isTextInput) {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        this.textInput.focus();\n      }\n    });\n\n    this.canvas.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {\n      const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n      \n      this.pointerDownX = x;\n      this.pointerDownY = y;\n      this.hasDragged = false;\n\n      const hit = this.root.hitTest(x, y);\n      \n      if (this.focusedComponent && this.focusedComponent !== hit) {\n        this.focusedComponent.isFocused = false;\n        this.focusedComponent = null;\n        this.singleLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.multiLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.singleLineInput.blur();\n        this.multiLineInput.blur();\n      }\n      \n      if (hit) {\n        hit.isPressed = true;\n        this.pressedComponent = hit;\n        \n        // Focus text input immediately on touch start for reliable mobile keyboard\n        if ((hit as any).isTextInput) {\n          e.preventDefault();\n          this.focusedComponent = hit;\n          hit.isFocused = true;\n          hit.needsScrollIntoView = true;\n          this.textInput.style.display = 'block';\n          if (this.textInput.value !== (hit as any).value) {\n            this.textInput.value = (hit as any).value || '';\n          }\n          this.textInput.focus();\n        }\n        \n        let node: UIComponent | undefined = hit;\n        while (node) {\n          if (node.onPointerDown) node.onPointerDown(x, y, this);\n          node = node.parent;\n        }\n      } else {\n        this.focusedComponent = null;\n        this.singleLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.multiLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.singleLineInput.blur();\n        this.multiLineInput.blur();\n      }\n      this.requestRender();\n    });\n\n    this.canvas.addEventListener('pointerup', (e) => {\n      const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n      \n      const hit = this.root.hitTest(x, y);\n      \n      if (this.pressedComponent) {\n        this.pressedComponent.isPressed = false;\n        \n        let node: UIComponent | undefined = this.pressedComponent;\n        while (node) {\n          if (node.onPointerUp) node.onPointerUp(x, y, this);\n          node = node.parent;\n        }\n        \n        // Only trigger click if released inside the pressed component and no drag occurred\n        const isInside = x >= this.pressedComponent.x && x <= this.pressedComponent.x + this.pressedComponent.width &&\n                         y >= this.pressedComponent.y && y <= this.pressedComponent.y + this.pressedComponent.height;\n                         \n        if (isInside && !this.hasDragged) {\n          this.focusedComponent = this.pressedComponent;\n          this.pressedComponent.isFocused = true;\n          \n          this.pressedComponent.handleClick(x, y, this);\n        }\n        this.pressedComponent = null;\n      }\n      this.requestRender();\n    });\n\n    this.canvas.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {\n      const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n      \n      if (this.pressedComponent) {\n        if (Math.abs(x - this.pointerDownX) > 25 || Math.abs(y - this.pointerDownY) > 25) {\n          this.hasDragged = true;\n          this.pressedComponent.isPressed = false; // Cancel visual press state\n        }\n        \n        let node: UIComponent | undefined = this.pressedComponent;\n        while (node) {\n          if (node.onPointerMove) node.onPointerMove(x, y, this);\n          node = node.parent;\n        }\n      }\n    });",
    "new_string": "  private setupEvents() {\n    const getPointerCoords = (e: MouseEvent | PointerEvent) => {\n      const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n      // Normalisasi koordinat: jika CSS meleset dari buffer internal, ini akan menyesuaikan kembali\n      const scaleX = this.canvas.width / rect.width / dpr;\n      const scaleY = this.canvas.height / rect.height / dpr;\n      return {\n        x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX,\n        y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY\n      };\n    };\n\n this.focusedComponent.isFocused = false;\n        this.focusedComponent = null;\n        this.singleLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.multiLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.singleLineInput.blur();\n        this.multiLineInput.blur();\n      }\n      \n      if (hit) {\n        hit.isPressed = true;\n        this.pressedComponent = hit;\n        \n        // Focus text input immediately on touch start for reliable mobile keyboard\n        if ((hit as any).isTextInput) {\n          e.preventDefault();\n          this.focusedComponent = hit;\n          hit.isFocused = true;\n          hit.needsScrollIntoView = true;\n          this.textInput.style.display = 'block';\n          if (this.textInput.value !== (hit as any).value) {\n 'none';\n        this.multiLineInput.style.display = 'none';\n        this.singleLineInput.blur();\n        this.multiLineInput.blur();\n      }\n      this.requestRender();\n    });\n\n this.pressedComponent.height;\n                         \n        if (isInside && !this.hasDragged) {\n          this.focusedComponent = this.pressedComponent;\n
